image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder why things fall apart? It’s called entropy.
Context visual: In physics, entropy measures disorder. The universe naturally favors chaos over neatness.
Escalation visual: Imagine a tidy room. Over time, it becomes a chaotic mess. That’s entropy in action.
Evidence visual: The second law of thermodynamics states that total entropy can never decrease. It’s a one-way street.
Payoff visual: This principle isn’t just theory. It drives engines, powers reactions, and defines the flow of time itself.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the universe’s secrets? Hit subscribe and explore with me.
